responsibilities: Design and train NLP models for text classification, named entity recognition, and intent detection tasks
Fine-tune transformer-based language models such as BERT and RoBERTa for domain-specific text understanding
Build information retrieval and semantic search systems that power document and knowledge base search
Develop text preprocessing and tokenization pipelines optimized for multilingual and noisy real-world text
Implement entity extraction and relation extraction systems to populate structured knowledge bases
Evaluate model performance using precision, recall, and F1 metrics against labeled benchmark datasets
Collaborate with product teams to integrate NLP capabilities into chatbots, search, and document workflows
Optimize NLP model inference for latency and throughput in high-volume production text processing pipelines
Curate and annotate text datasets, establishing labeling guidelines to ensure consistent data quality
Stay current with NLP research and apply state-of-the-art techniques to improve text understanding accuracy
